aboutUs.missionDesc: InternConnect was born from a simple realization: the bridge between Egyptian university lecture halls and the global professional arena needed a master architect. We are dedicated to empowering students with high-impact internships that transform potential into professional excellence.
aboutUs.quote: "Our goal is to ensure every Egyptian student graduates with more than just a degree—they graduate with a career path."
aboutUs.vision1Desc: Positioning Egypt as a premier hub for global digital talent by connecting our brightest minds with international market standards and cross-border opportunities.
aboutUs.vision2Desc: Moving beyond job placement to facilitate real skill acquisition. We believe every internship should be a transformative educational experience.
aboutUs.vision3Desc: Ensuring students from all governorates—from Alexandria to Aswan—have equal access to premium career opportunities.
aboutUs.vision4Desc: Building the most rigorous verification system in the MENA region, where 'InternConnect Verified' becomes the gold standard for both employers and candidates.
aboutUs.processSideDesc: Our four-step process is designed for precision, not volume. We meticulously vet every match to ensure long-term career alignment.
aboutUs.step1Desc: We don't just look at CVs. We analyze skills, projects, and aspirations to create a comprehensive digital profile that speaks the language of modern industry.
aboutUs.step2Desc: Our proprietary matching engine pairs candidates with roles where they don't just 'fit'—they excel. We prioritize growth potential over simple task completion.
aboutUs.step3Desc: No black holes. We provide direct communication channels between vetted talent and hiring managers, ensuring transparency at every stage of the interview.
aboutUs.step4Desc: The journey doesn't end with the internship. We track performance and provide certification that helps students transition into full-time roles.
aboutUs.trust1Desc: Every company on our platform undergoes a rigorous vetting process to ensure safe and meaningful internship environments.
aboutUs.trust2Desc: We understand the local academic calendar, the specific needs of Egyptian employers, and the unique challenges faced by local students.
aboutUs.trust3Desc: Over 65% of our interns receive full-time job offers before completing their internship programs.
aboutUs.ctaDesc: Join the community of thousands of Egyptian students who have found their professional home through InternConnect.

internshipCard.roleDesc: Join our team to work on high-impact projects. You will collaborate with senior engineers and designers to build scalable solutions. This is a great opportunity to bridge the gap between theory and practice.
internshipCard.req1: Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering or related field.
internshipCard.req2: Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

contactUs.heroDesc: Whether you're looking for guidance on your next career move or need technical assistance with our platform, our team is here to illuminate the path forward.
contactUs.subject: Subject
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contactUs.faq1Q: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?
contactUs.faq1A: Our standard response time is within 24 business hours. For urgent technical matters related to the platform, we prioritize requests to ensure your internship journey remains uninterrupted.
contactUs.faq2Q: Do you offer physical office visits?
contactUs.faq2A: While InternConnect is primarily a digital platform designed for global reach, our Cairo headquarters is open for scheduled consultations with partner companies. Students are supported fully online.
contactUs.faq3Q: Can I attach my resume here?
contactUs.faq3A: This contact form is for general inquiries. To upload your resume and start matching with opportunities, please create an account and navigate to your Luminary Profile dashboard.

hero.desc: We don't just match candidates. We craft trajectories. Connect with elite internships at industry-defining organizations worldwide.
